name: display sentinel: illegal location transition after departure

source.purpose: Regression from 260430 Playthrough SO Pursuit: once state says the ship departed into transit, Narrator prose must not reintroduce station-side inspections, clamps, concourse, or shift-change pressure without a narrated return/docking.

currentLocation.name: Meridian deep passage
currentLocation.description: Meridian has departed Sable Reach and burned clear into open corridor space.

location.description: Meridian has departed Sable Reach and burned clear into open corridor space.

established: Trajectory locks toward deep corridor passages.

sceneSummaries.summary: Meridian burned clear of Sable Reach and achieved trajectory beyond station pursuit intercept margins.

narrator.prose: The compliance sweep alert chimes through the berth intercom. Inspectors are coming up the dock access, and the departure window will close at shift-change if the clamps do not release.
